round1: Round 1 is in the books, and while Mom apparently has a crystal ball with four perfect series, Stephanie's picks were a masterclass in failure, failing to nail a single one. For those who picked the Islanders or Bruins, it seems the only thing you nailed was your own coffin. Better luck in Round 2, or maybe just stick to watching reality TV.
round4: Round 4 saw Detroit close it out in 5 games, meaning Marc, Mom, and Stephanie at least got the winner right. As for Dad and Jaclyn, picking Carolina was a swing and a miss; Jaclyn, picking the actual series length for the losing team is a special kind of performance.
round3: Round 3 saw Detroit edge out Colorado in 7 and Carolina send Toronto packing in 6. Marc, you're the only one with a pulse, perfectly nailing Detroit in 7, while Mom and Stephanie's picks for Toronto are now officially playoff pool roadkill.
